just look at my crit stacks here like I mean ain't that pretty good
if it's something like 'deal active damage equal to x% of poison stacks on the enemy' then it would because it's the awakener dealing direct damage
figured as much, it just doesn't really make sense to make poison ticks be a specific character's dmg
if that would be the case then they'd probably make it a different more unique dot
I would more or less count it as getting the last hit
Since the character is actively causing that damage to happen
also it would be really asinine to have something like 'the poison belongs to the first/last awakener who applied poison on the enemy'
such a pain to manage omfg
there are critical points to think about as well like what if an awakener deals 99% of the poison but a different one applies the little bit extra needed to kill the enemy
or if 2 different awakeners perfectly apply half of the poison needed to kill an enemy
i don't think it's a pain to implement per se but i also don't think it exists

this is just devil's advocate at this point but the main idea is still that it's much easier to consider poison and other damaging status effects as neutral damage rather than belonging to any specific awakener
That would be really unrealistic tbh
